response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: Checked vocals of 'BANG!!!' and 'Bad Apple!!' against reference lyrics. Verified spelling and wording to match vocal performance. 2. JSON Usage: Fully utilized the lyrics reference and manually verified transcription and timestamps. Subtitled the on-screen title card at 02:38.000 during the instrumental break. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timed entries precisely to vocal audio cues, avoiding cascading delays during fast lyric deliveries. Left instrumental gaps silent.

subtitles.original: 聴かせてあげる
subtitles.english: I'll let you hear it

subtitles.original: やってやるから考えな
subtitles.english: I'll show you what I've got, so watch out

subtitles.original: アタシがついてるから
subtitles.english: Because I've got your back

subtitles.original: Everybody say I want to be free
subtitles.english: Everybody say, I want to be free!

subtitles.original: 喰らうこのビート 空間全部黙らす
subtitles.english: Take in this beat, it silences the entire space

subtitles.original: Shout it out! Shout it out!
subtitles.english: Shout it out! Shout it out!

subtitles.original: 目覚ませ 鳴らせ BANG!!! 突き破る私
subtitles.english: Wake up, make it ring, BANG!!! Breaking through is me

subtitles.original: BANG!!! 突き破る私
subtitles.english: BANG!!! I'll break right through!

subtitles.original: ねぇ、BANG!!! 突き破る私
subtitles.english: Hey, BANG!!! I'll break right through!

subtitles.original: BANG!!! 突き破る私
subtitles.english: BANG!!! I'll break right through!

subtitles.original: 生まれたその時から選んできたんだ
subtitles.english: I've chosen my path since the day I was born

subtitles.original: 思い出せ 私は私だ
subtitles.english: Remember, I am myself

subtitles.original: 不可能なことなど何一つもない
subtitles.english: There is absolutely nothing that is impossible

subtitles.original: 信じなさい
subtitles.english: Believe in yourself

subtitles.original: 生まれたその時から選んできたんだ
subtitles.english: You've chosen your path since the day you were born

subtitles.original: 思い出せ あなたはあなただ
subtitles.english: Remember, you are yourself

subtitles.original: 不可能なことなど何一つもない
subtitles.english: There is absolutely nothing that is impossible

subtitles.original: 信じなさい 自分に
subtitles.english: Believe in yourself

subtitles.original: Hate, Like, Trust, Doubt, I don't care, 吹っ飛べ BANG!
subtitles.english: Hate, like, trust, doubt, I don't care, blow them away, BANG!

subtitles.original: Hate, Like, Trust, Doubt, I don't care, 吹っ飛べ BANG!
subtitles.english: Hate, like, trust, doubt, I don't care, blow them away, BANG!

subtitles.original:
Bad Apple!!
作詞: Haruka / 作曲: ZUN
subtitles.english:
[Song: Bad Apple!!]
[Lyrics: Haruka / Composition: ZUN]

subtitles.original: 流れてく時の中ででも
subtitles.english: Even in the midst of flowing time,

subtitles.original: 気だるさがほらグルグル廻って
subtitles.english: I feel languid, look, spinning around and around,

subtitles.original: 私から離れる心も
subtitles.english: and even the heart that's leaving me

subtitles.original: 見えないわそう知らない？
subtitles.english: I cannot see, didn't you know?

subtitles.original: 自分から動くこともなく
subtitles.english: Without even getting myself to move,

subtitles.original: 時の隙間に流され続けて
subtitles.english: I continue to drift through the cracks of time.

subtitles.original: 知らないわ周りのことなど
subtitles.english: I don't know anything about my surroundings,

subtitles.original: 私は私それだけ
subtitles.english: I am just myself, and no more.

subtitles.original: 夢見てる？なにも見てない？
subtitles.english: Am I dreaming? Or seeing nothing?

subtitles.original: 語るも無駄な自分の言葉
subtitles.english: My own words are useless to even speak.

subtitles.original: 悲しむなんて疲れるだけよ
subtitles.english: Being sad will only wear me out,

subtitles.original: 何も感じず過ごせばいいの
subtitles.english: so it's fine to just live without feeling anything.

subtitles.original: 戸惑う言葉与えられても
subtitles.english: Even if I'm given words of confusion,

subtitles.original: 自分の心ただ上の空
subtitles.english: my heart is just somewhere else.

subtitles.original: もし私から動くのならば
subtitles.english: If I were to move of my own accord,

subtitles.original: すべて変えるのなら黒にする
subtitles.english: and if I were to change everything, I'd make it black.

subtitles.original: こんな自分に未来はあるの？
subtitles.english: Is there a future for someone like me?

subtitles.original: こんな世界に私はいるの？
subtitles.english: Do I even exist in a world like this?

subtitles.original: 今切ないの？今悲しいの？
subtitles.english: Am I in pain now? Am I sad now?

subtitles.original: 自分の事もわからないまま
subtitles.english: Without even understanding myself,

subtitles.original: 歩むことさえ疲れるだけよ
subtitles.english: even walking will only wear me out.

subtitles.original: 人のことなど知りもしないわ
subtitles.english: I don't know or care about anyone else.

subtitles.original: こんな私も変われるのなら
subtitles.english: If even someone like me can change,

subtitles.original: もし変われるのなら白になる
subtitles.english: if I can change, I will turn white.

subtitles.original: 流れてく時の中ででも
subtitles.english: Even in the midst of flowing time,

subtitles.original: 気だるさがほらグルグル廻って
subtitles.english: I feel languid, look, spinning around and around,

subtitles.original: 私から離れる心も
subtitles.english: and even the heart that's leaving me

subtitles.original: 見えないわそう知らない？
subtitles.english: I cannot see, didn't you know?

subtitles.original: 自分から動くこともなく
subtitles.english: Without even getting myself to move,

subtitles.original: 時の隙間に流され続けて
subtitles.english: I continue to drift through the cracks of time.

subtitles.original: 知らないわ周りのことなど
subtitles.english: I don't know anything about my surroundings,

subtitles.original: 私は私それだけ
subtitles.english: I am just myself, and no more.

subtitles.original: 夢見てる？なにも見てない？
subtitles.english: Am I dreaming? Or seeing nothing?

subtitles.original: 語るも無駄な自分の言葉
subtitles.english: My own words are useless to even speak.
